title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at CONCOR

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at CONCOR
jsonLd.description:
Join the CONCOR family as a Logistics Manager in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CONCOR:
CONCOR is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CONCOR!
